programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: From stunning, tropical rural land in Mexico, to a dreamy northern lake in Maine and historic land in arid Puglia, Italy, homeowners with a unique eye for art, architecture, and history have meticulously crafted unique family homes.

programme.title: Anything but Gray
programme.desc: Gray, Grumpy and Chelcie help a retired couple revive a 1915 home in a historic waterfront neighborhood; they design with the home's history in mind, including a kitchen reno, eccentric wallpaper and bold colors to delight their grandkids.

programme.title: In With the Old
programme.sub-title: New Britain, CT: The Gad Stanley House
programme.desc: A couple lovingly restores a historic home in picturesque New England.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a half-finished Victorian mansion in the Historic District that was too good to pass up.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael jump at the chance to restore an 1866 Victorian designed by famed Galveston architect Nicholas Clayton. At 3,500 square feet, they face a massive undertaking to honor the home's historical integrity while staying within budget.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take a gamble on a 1979 property as old homes become harder to find in a saturated market—with fewer historical details to honor, they must get creative with their designs.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael buy a shack from 1898 that's been abandoned for decades; with multiple problems, a tight budget and their second baby on the way, they face big challenges to transform it into a neighborhood gem.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Seeing potential in forgotten historic spaces, city homeowners stretched their creativity and modernized historic residences for family living in New Orleans, London, and Chicago.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Ambitious homeowners tackle the challenge of transforming unusual structures into thoughtfully designed family homes--from a converted cowshed in the English countryside to an abandoned church in New York and an old mechanic shop in London.

programme.title: What's for Sale? With a View
programme.desc: Anna and Elliott are buying a second home with a dream view of Big Sur's iconic cliffs and crashing waves.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: What's for Sale? With a View
programme.desc: Araceli and her daughter Victoria search for a coveted oceanfront view with grassy dunes, boardwalk paths and picket fences in the Hamptons.

programme.desc: Brandon and Jana want the ultimate palm tree and ocean beach view that Sanibel Island is famous for.

programme.title: For the Love of Kitchens
programme.sub-title: A Kitchen for a Forever Home
programme.desc: The duo makes a kitchen for an army officer and his family.

programme.title: For the Love of Kitchens
programme.desc: Paul and Helen create a shaker-style kitchen in rural Connecticut.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: For the Love of Kitchens
programme.desc: While visiting their New York showroom, Paul and Helen help a family create an elegant kitchen in their new apartment with a design inspired by the coastline of Liz's hometown in the U.K.; back at Cotes Mill, Robin makes a brand-new drawer handle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: For the Love of Kitchens
programme.sub-title: Big Dreams for a Small Kitchen
programme.desc: Paul and Helen create a small kitchen for a cottage.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Motel Rescue
programme.desc: In Avon, North Carolina, a father and son need help turning their motel around; Lindsey needs to teach the duo some tricks of the trade, old and new, to ensure this generational family-owned motel thrives.

programme.title: Motel Rescue
programme.desc: In Carolina Beach, North Carolina, Lindsey must help an owner bounce back from burnout after a hurricane wreaked havoc on her motel and her spirit; it will take a bold design and some creative business ideas to reinvigorate this beachside motel.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Longtime Friends Give a Lake House New Life in South Carolina
programme.desc: A decades long friendship explores uncharted waters when an agent helps her longtime friend buy and renovate a lake home; they've made countless memories on Lake Hartwell, so it's only fitting that's where he's looking to find his forever home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Reimagined
programme.desc: Host and designer Vern Yip travels across the country to mentor brave renovators who have taken.

programme.sub-title: A Vermont Family Looks for a Waterfront Oasis on Lake Champlain
programme.desc: A Vermont family finally finds their dream spot on Lake Champlain.

programme.title: Home Reimagined
programme.desc: Host and designer Vern Yip travels across the country to mentor brave renovators who have taken.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Byram and Kendra are not only husband and wife, they are also music producers; they are looking for an awesome lakefront property that they can live in, record music in and entertain clients in the music industry.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: When Kimberly and Donald got married, they became one big, blended family; now that their adult children will start having children of their own, they are searching for a big home on the lake.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Lee and Greg are empty nesters looking for a lakefront property that their adult children can come and visit; their search for their dream lake home includes a property with a large separate guest house and an outdoor shower.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Peter and Gillian are searching for a lakefront property to call home and host charity events in; their search for a house on the lake will include tours of an upscale farmhouse and resort-like property with its own pub.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Married for 16 years with two children, Mike and Linda are looking for a lakefront property to call a family home; they are real estate investors and are looking for a property that is a good investment.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Byram and Kendra are not only husband and wife, they are also music producers; they are looking for an awesome lakefront property that they can live in, record music in and entertain clients in the music industry.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: When Kimberly and Donald got married, they became one big, blended family; now that their adult children will start having children of their own, they are searching for a big home on the lake.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Lee and Greg are empty nesters looking for a lakefront property that their adult children can come and visit; their search for their dream lake home includes a property with a large separate guest house and an outdoor shower.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Peter and Gillian are searching for a lakefront property to call home and host charity events in; their search for a house on the lake will include tours of an upscale farmhouse and resort-like property with its own pub.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Married for 16 years with two children, Mike and Linda are looking for a lakefront property to call a family home; they are real estate investors and are looking for a property that is a good investment.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Byram and Kendra are not only husband and wife, they are also music producers; they are looking for an awesome lakefront property that they can live in, record music in and entertain clients in the music industry.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: When Kimberly and Donald got married, they became one big, blended family; now that their adult children will start having children of their own, they are searching for a big home on the lake.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Lee and Greg are empty nesters looking for a lakefront property that their adult children can come and visit; their search for their dream lake home includes a property with a large separate guest house and an outdoor shower.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Peter and Gillian are searching for a lakefront property to call home and host charity events in; their search for a house on the lake will include tours of an upscale farmhouse and resort-like property with its own pub.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders travel to Weston, West Virginia to teach two young carpenter apprentices how to build a timber frame barn; along the way a 4H camper returns to the site to check out the cabin he and his fellow campers built with the guys.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders restore a timber frame home on a frozen field in West Virginia; Mark and Johnny visit an extraordinary mountain top retreat with a log home and timber frame pool house; Alex Webb builds a lord's table and bench at his workshop.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders have a whole lot of fun in Abingdon, Va, while saving an old barn, the guys explore the local history as they work with a master craftsman, operate an old sawmill, explore a restored cabin, and even drive an antique tractor.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders head down to Gatlinburg, Tennessee to build a cabin high in the hills of the Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: In Blountville, Tenn., the Builders find a true treasure, a log cabin built in 1818; Mark teaches the new crew members how to scout log cabins; they take a trip to historic Blountville and Johnny Jett gets to knock over an old home all by himself.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders create log cabin treehouses in the Smoky Mountains of Sevierville, TN, and must maneuver the logs through trees to reach the raised platforms.

programme.title: Motel Rescue
programme.desc: Lindsey Kurowski takes her expertise to Guerneville, CA to help the owner of a rustic cabin motel that hasn't been updated in decades; she'll create an overall aesthetic, and make changes to help generate more revenue.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The team takes on a rebuild for a family after a devastating storm destroys their camp; with five decades of memories to honor and a vision for a larger space, the crew battles freezing temperatures and a ticking clock to finish the cabin in time.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The crew helps a couple turn their chopped up, suburban cabin into the spacious, rustic Maine getaway they've always wanted; with the help of some new faces and upgraded equipment, the Cabin Masters breathe new life into this family's retreat.

programme.title: Motel Rescue
programme.desc: Lindsey Kurowski takes her expertise to Guerneville, CA to help the owner of a rustic cabin motel that hasn't been updated in decades; she'll create an overall aesthetic, and make changes to help generate more revenue.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The team takes on a rebuild for a family after a devastating storm destroys their camp; with five decades of memories to honor and a vision for a larger space, the crew battles freezing temperatures and a ticking clock to finish the cabin in time.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The crew helps a couple turn their chopped up, suburban cabin into the spacious, rustic Maine getaway they've always wanted; with the help of some new faces and upgraded equipment, the Cabin Masters breathe new life into this family's retreat.
